head-spread: flex items-baseline justify-between gap-6 flex-wrap mb-14
head-aligned: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr] gap-x-10 items-start mb-8
h2: text-h2 font-semibold leading-snug tracking-h2 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
h3: text-h3-sm font-semibold leading-heading tracking-h3 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
lede: text-lede leading-loose text-konde-ink-700 m-0 mb-6 max-w-[64ch]
narrative: flex flex-col gap-3.5 max-w-[64ch] text-body leading-loose text-konde-ink-700
callout-green: px-6 py-5 border-l-4 border-konde-green bg-konde-cream-100 rounded-r-konde-md text-body leading-loose text-konde-ink-700 max-w-[78ch]
